# Artifact Schema & Unified Creation System

## Problem
Storyboard has multiple artifact types (prototype, component, canvas, object, record, flow, external prototype) created via different surfaces (widget menu, command palette, workspace button). Each surface has its own form logic, validation, and fields — leading to bugs, missing features, and drift.

## Solution: Three Layers

### 1. Artifact Schema (source of truth)
A declarative JSON schema per artifact type defining:
- **Fields**: name, title, description, location, format, url, etc.
- **Validation**: required, pattern, uniqueness constraints
- **Defaults**: per-field defaults
- **Operations**: create, edit, delete, duplicate

### 2. Central API + CLI
- `storyboard artifact create <type>` — validates against schema, performs FS ops
- `storyboard artifact edit <type> <id>` — update metadata
- `storyboard artifact delete <type> <id>` — safe removal
- `storyboard artifact list [type]` — enumerate artifacts
- Server endpoints: `POST/PATCH/DELETE /_storyboard/artifact`

### 3. Unified UI Components
- Single `<ArtifactForm type={type} />` component driven by schema
- Renders correct fields, validation, and actions for any artifact type
- Used identically across all surfaces (command palette, add widget menu, workspace)

## Artifact Types & Fields (Draft)

| Type | Required | Optional |
|------|----------|----------|
| prototype | name | title, description, author, icon, tags, team |
| external-prototype | name, url | title, description, author |
| component | name, location, format | title |
| canvas | name | title, description |
| object | name | (freeform JSON body) |
| record | name | (array with id per entry) |
| flow | name | $global, (freeform with $ref support) |

## Roles

- **Leader (me)**: Plan, coordinate, synthesize into final spec on this markdown
- **Sketcher**: Create story components for `<ArtifactForm>` unified UI
- **Architect**: Define the schema format, API endpoints, CLI interface, validation rules

## Status: In Progress

# ArtifactForm — Unified Creation UI

Schema-driven form at `src/components/ArtifactForm/`

## Modes
- **TypePicker** — segmented control to switch types
- **Compact** — dropdown + required fields only
- **Fixed type** — e.g. `type="prototype"`
- **Edit** — same form, Save labels

## Files
- `artifactSchemas.js` — 7 artifact type schemas
- `ArtifactForm.jsx` — unified form component
- `ArtifactForm.module.css` — styles
- `artifact-form.story.jsx` — 11 stories

# Artifact Schema & API Specification

## 1. Schema Format

Each artifact type is defined by a JSON Schema document stored in `packages/storyboard/src/core/artifact/schemas/`. The schema drives validation, form rendering, and CLI help text.

```json
// schemas/prototype.schema.json
{
  "$id": "artifact:prototype",
  "type": "object",
  "required": ["name"],
  "properties": {
    "name": {
      "type": "string",
      "pattern": "^[a-z0-9]+(?:-[a-z0-9]+)*$",
      "maxLength": 64
    },
    "title": { "type": "string" },
    "description": { "type": "string" },
    "author": {
      "oneOf": [
        { "type": "string" },
        { "type": "array", "items": { "type": "string" } }
      ]
    },
    "folder": { "type": "string" },
    "icon": { "type": "string" },
    "tags": { "type": "array", "items": { "type": "string" } },
    "team": { "type": "string" },
    "url": {
      "type": "string",
      "format": "uri",
      "description": "External URL — when present, prototype is external (no index.jsx)"
    },
    "flow": { "type": "boolean", "default": false },
    "partial": { "type": "string" }
  }
}
```

### All Artifact Types

| Type | Required | Optional |
|------|----------|----------|
| `prototype` | name | title, description, author, folder, icon, tags, team, flow, partial, **url** (makes it external) |
| `canvas` | name | title, description, folder, grid, jsx |
| `component` | name | directory |
| `flow` | name, prototype | title, description, author, folder, globals, copy-from, starting-page |
| `object` | name | folder, body (freeform JSON) |
| `record` | name | folder, entries (array with id) |
| `page` | prototype, path | folder, template |

> **Note:** External prototypes are just prototypes with a `url` field. When `url` is present, no `index.jsx` or flow is generated — the prototype opens the URL in a new tab.

All names: `^[a-z0-9]+(?:-[a-z0-9]+)*$`, max 64 chars.

---

## 2. API Design

Endpoints at `/_storyboard/artifact/`:

| Method | Path | Purpose |
|--------|------|--------|
| POST | `/` | Create artifact |
| PATCH | `/` | Edit metadata |
| DELETE | `/` | Delete artifact |
| GET | `/list?type=X` | List artifacts |
| GET | `/schema?type=X` | Get JSON Schema |

### POST / (Create)
```json
{ "type": "prototype", "name": "my-app", "folder": "main", "flow": true }
// → 201 { success, type, name, path, files[] }

// External prototype — same type, just add url:
{ "type": "prototype", "name": "figma-proto", "url": "https://figma.com/..." }
// → 201 { success, type, name, path, files: ["...prototype.json"] }
```

### PATCH / (Edit)
```json
{ "type": "prototype", "name": "my-app", "title": "New Title" }
// → 200 { success, updated }
```

### DELETE /
```json
{ "type": "prototype", "name": "my-app", "folder": "main" }
// → 200 { success, deleted }
```

### Errors
- 400: `{ error, field }` — validation failure
- 409: `{ error }` — name conflict
- 404: `{ error }` — not found

---

## 3. CLI Design

```bash
storyboard artifact create <type> [flags]
storyboard artifact edit <type> <name> [flags]
storyboard artifact delete <type> <name> [--force]
storyboard artifact list [type] [--folder X]
storyboard artifact schema <type>
```

Examples:
```bash
storyboard artifact create prototype --name my-app --folder main --flow
storyboard artifact create prototype --name figma-proto --url https://figma.com/...
storyboard artifact create canvas --name design-system
storyboard artifact create flow --name settings --prototype my-app
storyboard artifact create object --name nav --body '{"items":[]}'
storyboard artifact create component --name LoginForm
storyboard artifact create page --prototype my-app --path settings/general
```

Flags map 1:1 to schema fields. `--json` for structured output.

---

## 4. Validation Rules

1. **Parse** — coerce types (string→array for author)
2. **Schema validate** — JSON Schema (required, patterns, types)
3. **Semantic validate** — uniqueness, references exist, reserved names
4. Returns `{ valid: true, normalized }` or `{ valid: false, errors[] }`

| Rule | Scope |
|------|-------|
| Kebab-case, max 64 | all names |
| Unique within scope | all |
| Reserved: index, app, _app | prototype, page |
| Valid URL (when provided) | prototype with url |
| Prototype must exist | flow, page |
| No duplicate flow names | flow |
| url + flow are mutually exclusive | prototype |

---

## 5. Disk Operations

**prototype (standard):** `src/prototypes/{folder.folder?/}{name}/` → `.prototype.json` + `index.jsx` + optional `.flow.json`

**prototype (external, url provided):** same dir → `.prototype.json` with `url` field only. No index.jsx, no flow.

**canvas:** `src/canvas/{folder?/}{name}.canvas.jsonl` + optional `.canvas.jsx`

**component:** `src/components/{dir?/}{PascalName}/` → `.jsx` + `.module.css` + `.story.jsx`

**flow:** inside prototype dir → `{name}.flow.json`

**object:** `src/data/{name}.object.json` (global) or inside prototype (scoped)

**record:** `src/data/{name}.record.json` (global) or inside prototype (scoped)

**page:** inside prototype → `pages/{path}.jsx`

---

## 6. File Structure

```
packages/storyboard/src/core/artifact/
├── schemas/*.schema.json
├── validate.js
├── operations.js
├── routes.js
└── index.js
```

Integration: `routeHandlers.set('artifact', ...)` in server-plugin.js. Existing workshop routes become aliases during migration.

# Artifact Schema & API Specification

## 1. Schema Format

Each artifact type is defined by a JSON Schema document stored in `packages/storyboard/src/core/artifact/schemas/`. The schema drives validation, form rendering, and CLI help text.

```json
// schemas/prototype.schema.json
{
  "$id": "artifact:prototype",
  "type": "object",
  "required": ["name"],
  "properties": {
    "name": {
      "type": "string",
      "pattern": "^[a-z0-9]+(?:-[a-z0-9]+)*$",
      "maxLength": 64
    },
    "title": { "type": "string" },
    "description": { "type": "string" },
    "author": {
      "oneOf": [
        { "type": "string" },
        { "type": "array", "items": { "type": "string" } }
      ]
    },
    "folder": { "type": "string" },
    "icon": { "type": "string" },
    "tags": { "type": "array", "items": { "type": "string" } },
    "team": { "type": "string" },
    "url": {
      "type": "string",
      "format": "uri",
      "description": "External URL — when present, prototype is external (no index.jsx)"
    },
    "flow": { "type": "boolean", "default": false },
    "partial": { "type": "string" }
  }
}
```

### All Artifact Types

| Type | Required | Optional |
|------|----------|----------|
| `prototype` | name | title, description, author, folder, icon, tags, team, flow, partial, **url** (makes it external) |
| `canvas` | name | title, description, folder, grid, jsx |
| `component` | name | directory |
| `flow` | name, prototype | title, description, author, folder, globals, copy-from, starting-page |
| `object` | name | folder, body (freeform JSON) |
| `record` | name | folder, entries (array with id) |
| `page` | prototype, path | folder, template |

> **Note:** External prototypes are just prototypes with a `url` field. When `url` is present, no `index.jsx` or flow is generated — the prototype opens the URL in a new tab.

All names: `^[a-z0-9]+(?:-[a-z0-9]+)*$`, max 64 chars.

---

## 2. API Design

Endpoints at `/_storyboard/artifact/`:

| Method | Path | Purpose |
|--------|------|--------|
| POST | `/` | Create artifact |
| PATCH | `/` | Edit metadata |
| DELETE | `/` | Delete artifact |
| GET | `/list?type=X` | List artifacts |
| GET | `/schema?type=X` | Get JSON Schema |

### POST / (Create)
```json
{ "type": "prototype", "name": "my-app", "folder": "main", "flow": true }
// → 201 { success, type, name, path, files[] }

// External prototype — same type, just add url:
{ "type": "prototype", "name": "figma-proto", "url": "https://figma.com/..." }
// → 201 { success, type, name, path, files: ["...prototype.json"] }
```

### PATCH / (Edit)
```json
{ "type": "prototype", "name": "my-app", "title": "New Title" }
// → 200 { success, updated }
```

### DELETE /
```json
{ "type": "prototype", "name": "my-app", "folder": "main" }
// → 200 { success, deleted }
```

### Errors
- 400: `{ error, field }` — validation failure
- 409: `{ error }` — name conflict
- 404: `{ error }` — not found

---

## 3. CLI Design

```bash
storyboard artifact create <type> [flags]
storyboard artifact edit <type> <name> [flags]
storyboard artifact delete <type> <name> [--force]
storyboard artifact list [type] [--folder X]
storyboard artifact schema <type>
```

Examples:
```bash
storyboard artifact create prototype --name my-app --folder main --flow
storyboard artifact create prototype --name figma-proto --url https://figma.com/...
storyboard artifact create canvas --name design-system
storyboard artifact create flow --name settings --prototype my-app

```

---

1. **Parse** — coerce types (string→array for author)
2. **Schema validate** — JSON Schema (required, patterns, types)
3. **Semantic validate** — uniqueness, references exist, reserved names

| Rule | Scope |
|------|-------|
| Kebab-case, max 64 | all names |
| Unique within scope | all |
| Reserved: index, app, _app | prototype, page |
| Valid URL (when provided) | prototype with url |
| Prototype must exist | flow, page |
| No duplicate flow names | flow |
| url + flow are mutually exclusive | prototype |

---

## 5. Disk Operations

**prototype (standard):** `src/prototypes/{folder.folder?/}{name}/` → `.prototype.json` + `index.jsx` + optional `.flow.json`

**prototype (external, url provided):** same dir → `.prototype.json` with `url` field only. No index.jsx, no flow.

**component:** `src/components/{dir?/}{PascalName}/` → `.jsx` + `.module.css` + `.story.jsx`

**flow:** inside prototype dir → `{name}.flow.json`

**object:** `src/data/{name}.object.json` (global) or inside prototype (scoped)

**record:** `src/data/{name}.record.json` (global) or inside prototype (scoped)

**page:** inside prototype → `pages/{path}.jsx`

---

```
packages/storyboard/src/core/artifact/
├── schemas/*.schema.json
├── validate.js
├── operations.js
├── routes.js
└── index.js
```

# Artifact Schema & API Specification

## 1. Schema Format

Each artifact type is defined by a JSON Schema document stored in `packages/storyboard/src/core/artifact/schemas/`. The schema drives validation, form rendering, and CLI help text.

```json
// schemas/prototype.schema.json
{
  "$id": "artifact:prototype",
  "type": "object",
  "required": ["name"],
  "properties": {
    "name": {
      "type": "string",
      "pattern": "^[a-z0-9]+(?:-[a-z0-9]+)*$",
      "maxLength": 64
    },
    "title": { "type": "string" },
    "description": { "type": "string" },
    "author": {
      "oneOf": [
        { "type": "string" },
        { "type": "array", "items": { "type": "string" } }
      ]
    },
    "folder": { "type": "string" },
    "icon": { "type": "string" },
    "tags": { "type": "array", "items": { "type": "string" } },
    "team": { "type": "string" },
    "url": {
      "type": "string",
      "format": "uri",
      "description": "External URL — when present, prototype is external (no index.jsx)"
    },
    "flow": { "type": "boolean", "default": false },
    "partial": { "type": "string" }
  }
}
```

| Type | Required | Optional |

| `component` | name | directory |
| `flow` | name, prototype | title, description, author, folder, globals, copy-from, starting-page |
| `object` | name | folder, body (freeform JSON) |
| `record` | name | folder, entries (array with id) |
| `page` | prototype, path | folder, template |

# Artifact Schema & API Specification

## 1. Schema Format

Each artifact type is defined by a JSON Schema document stored in `packages/storyboard/src/core/artifact/schemas/`. The schema drives validation, form rendering, and CLI help text.

```json
// schemas/prototype.schema.json
{
  "$id": "artifact:prototype",
  "type": "object",
  "required": ["name"],
  "properties": {
    "name": {
      "type": "string",
      "pattern": "^[a-z0-9]+(?:-[a-z0-9]+)*$",
      "maxLength": 64
    },
    "title": { "type": "string" },
    "description": { "type": "string" },
    "author": {
      "oneOf": [
        { "type": "string" },
        { "type": "array", "items": { "type": "string" } }
      ]
    },
    "folder": { "type": "string" },
    "icon": { "type": "string" },
    "tags": { "type": "array", "items": { "type": "string" } },
    "team": { "type": "string" },
    "url": {
      "type": "string",
      "format": "uri",
      "description": "External URL — when present, prototype is external (no index.jsx)"
    },
    "flow": { "type": "boolean", "default": false },
    "partial": { "type": "string" }
  }
}
```

### All Artifact Types

| Type | Required | Optional |
|------|----------|----------|
| `prototype` | name | title, description, author, folder, icon, tags, team, flow, partial, **url** (makes it external) |
| `canvas` | name | title, description, folder, grid, jsx |
| `component` | name | directory |
| `flow` | name, prototype | title, description, author, folder, globals, copy-from, starting-page |
| `object` | name | folder, body (freeform JSON) |
| `record` | name | folder, entries (array with id) |
| `page` | prototype, path | folder, template |

> **Note:** External prototypes are just prototypes with a `url` field. When `url` is present, no `index.jsx` or flow is generated — the prototype opens the URL in a new tab.

All names: `^[a-z0-9]+(?:-[a-z0-9]+)*$`, max 64 chars.

---

## 2. API Design

Endpoints at `/_storyboard/artifact/`:

| Method | Path | Purpose |
|--------|------|--------|
| POST | `/` | Create artifact |
| PATCH | `/` | Edit metadata |
| DELETE | `/` | Delete artifact |
| GET | `/list?type=X` | List artifacts |
| GET | `/schema?type=X` | Get JSON Schema |

### POST / (Create)
```json
{ "type": "prototype", "name": "my-app", "folder": "main", "flow": true }
// → 201 { success, type, name, path, files[] }

// External prototype — same type, just add url:
{ "type": "prototype", "name": "figma-proto", "url": "https://figma.com/..." }
// → 201 { success, type, name, path, files: ["...prototype.json"] }
```

### PATCH / (Edit)
```json
{ "type": "prototype", "name": "my-app", "title": "New Title" }
// → 200 { success, updated }
```

### DELETE /
```json
{ "type": "prototype", "name": "my-app", "folder": "main" }
// → 200 { success, deleted }
```

### Errors
- 400: `{ error, field }` — validation failure
- 409: `{ error }` — name conflict
- 404: `{ error }` — not found

## 3. CLI Design

```bash
storyboard artifact create <type> [flags]
storyboard artifact edit <type> <name> [flags]
storyboard artifact delete <type> <name> [--force]
storyboard artifact list [type] [--folder X]
storyboard artifact schema <type>
```

Examples:
```bash

storyboard artifact create prototype --name figma-proto --url https://figma.com/...

storyboard artifact create flow --name settings --prototype my-app

---

## 4. Validation Rules

1. **Parse** — coerce types (string→array for author)
2. **Schema validate** — JSON Schema (required, patterns, types)
3. **Semantic validate** — uniqueness, references exist, reserved names
4. Returns `{ valid: true, normalized }` or `{ valid: false, errors[] }`

| Rule | Scope |
|------|-------|
| Kebab-case, max 64 | all names |
| Unique within scope | all |
| Reserved: index, app, _app | prototype, page |
| Valid URL (when provided) | prototype with url |
| Prototype must exist | flow, page |
| No duplicate flow names | flow |
| url + flow are mutually exclusive | prototype |

---

**canvas:** `src/canvas/{folder?/}{name}.canvas.jsonl` + optional `.canvas.jsx`

**component:** `src/components/{dir?/}{PascalName}/` → `.jsx` + `.module.css` + `.story.jsx`

**flow:** inside prototype dir → `{name}.flow.json`

**object:** `src/data/{name}.object.json` (global) or inside prototype (scoped)

**record:** `src/data/{name}.record.json` (global) or inside prototype (scoped)

**page:** inside prototype → `pages/{path}.jsx`

# ArtifactForm — UI Layer

Renders forms from `ARTIFACT_SCHEMAS` at `src/components/ArtifactForm/artifactSchemas.js`.

## How the UI Consumes the Schema

```jsx
<ArtifactForm type="prototype" onSubmit={fn} />
// or with type picker:
<ArtifactForm onSubmit={fn} />
```

### Schema → Field Rendering

Each schema entry drives the form automatically:

| Schema field type | Renders as |
|---|---|
| `text` | `<TextInput>` with pattern hint caption |
| `url` | `<TextInput type="url">` with URL validation |
| `textarea` | `<Textarea rows={3}>` |
| `code` | `<Textarea rows={8}>` monospace + JSON validation |
| `select` | `<select>` — static options or `dynamic: "prototypes"` |
| `checkbox` | `<input type="checkbox">` inline with label |

### Schema → Validation

`validateArtifact(type, values)` runs client-side before submit:

1. **Required** — checks `field.required`
2. **Pattern** — regex from `field.pattern` (kebab-case, PascalCase, path)
3. **Max length** — `field.maxLength` (64 chars for names)
4. **URL format** — `new URL()` parse for `type: "url"` fields
5. **JSON parse** — `JSON.parse()` for `type: "code"` fields
6. **Mutual exclusivity** — `schema.mutuallyExclusive` groups (e.g. url+flow on prototype)

### Schema → Type Picker

The `TypeSelector` component reads all keys from `ARTIFACT_SCHEMAS` and renders a Primer `ActionMenu` dropdown with:
- `schema.icon` as leading visual
- `schema.label` as item text
- `schema.description` as block description

Switching types resets form values to that schema field defaults.

### Compact Mode

`<ArtifactForm compact>` filters `visibleFields` to only `field.required === true`, showing the minimal creation form.

### Schema → Submit Payload

On valid submit, calls `onSubmit({ type, operation, values })` where `values` maps field names to their input values. The consumer (command palette, canvas menu, CLI) translates this to the API call:

```js
// values from form:
{ name: "my-app", title: "My App", folder: "main", flow: true }
// → POST /_storyboard/artifact/
// body: { type: "prototype", name: "my-app", title: "My App", folder: "main", flow: true }
```

## Integration Points

- **Command Palette** — `CreateDialog.jsx` will import `ArtifactForm` + `ARTIFACT_SCHEMAS`
- **Canvas Add Menu** — renders `ArtifactForm` in a popover
- **Workspace Button** — renders `ArtifactForm` in a dialog
- **CLI** — `storyboard artifact create <type>` reads same schemas for flag generation

## File Structure

```
src/components/ArtifactForm/
├── artifactSchemas.js    ← Schema definitions + validateArtifact()
├── ArtifactForm.jsx      ← Main component (TypeSelector, FieldRenderer)
├── ArtifactForm.module.css
└── artifact-form.story.jsx  ← 11 stories
```

# ArtifactForm — UI Layer

Renders forms from `ARTIFACT_SCHEMAS` at `src/components/ArtifactForm/artifactSchemas.js`.

## How the UI Consumes the Schema

```jsx
<ArtifactForm type="prototype" onSubmit={fn} />
// or with type picker:
<ArtifactForm onSubmit={fn} />
```

### Schema → Field Rendering

Each schema entry drives the form automatically:

| Schema field type | Renders as |
|---|---|
| `text` | `<TextInput>` with pattern hint caption |
| `url` | `<TextInput type="url">` with URL validation |
| `textarea` | `<Textarea rows={3}>` |
| `code` | `<Textarea rows={8}>` monospace + JSON validation |
| `select` | `<select>` — static options or `dynamic: "prototypes"` |
| `checkbox` | `<input type="checkbox">` inline with label |

### Schema → Validation

`validateArtifact(type, values)` runs client-side before submit:

1. **Required** — checks `field.required`
2. **Pattern** — regex from `field.pattern` (kebab-case, PascalCase, path)
3. **Max length** — `field.maxLength` (64 chars for names)
4. **URL format** — `new URL()` parse for `type: "url"` fields
5. **JSON parse** — `JSON.parse()` for `type: "code"` fields
6. **Mutual exclusivity** — `schema.mutuallyExclusive` groups (e.g. url+flow on prototype)

### Schema → Type Picker

The `TypeSelector` component reads all keys from `ARTIFACT_SCHEMAS` and renders a Primer `ActionMenu` dropdown with:
- `schema.icon` as leading visual
- `schema.label` as item text
- `schema.description` as block description

Switching types resets form values to that schema field defaults.

### Compact Mode

`<ArtifactForm compact>` filters `visibleFields` to only `field.required === true`, showing the minimal creation form.

### Schema → Submit Payload

On valid submit, calls `onSubmit({ type, operation, values })` where `values` maps field names to their input values. The consumer (command palette, canvas menu, CLI) translates this to the API call:

```js
// values from form:
{ name: "my-app", title: "My App", folder: "main", flow: true }
// → POST /_storyboard/artifact/
// body: { type: "prototype", name: "my-app", title: "My App", folder: "main", flow: true }
```

## Integration Points

- **Command Palette** — `CreateDialog.jsx` will import `ArtifactForm` + `ARTIFACT_SCHEMAS`
- **Canvas Add Menu** — renders `ArtifactForm` in a popover
- **Workspace Button** — renders `ArtifactForm` in a dialog
- **CLI** — `storyboard artifact create <type>` reads same schemas for flag generation

```
src/components/ArtifactForm/
├── artifactSchemas.js    ← Schema definitions + validateArtifact()
├── ArtifactForm.jsx      ← Main component (TypeSelector, FieldRenderer)
├── ArtifactForm.module.css
└── artifact-form.story.jsx  ← 11 stories
```

# Artifact Schema & API Specification

## 1. Schema Format

Each artifact type is defined by a JSON Schema document stored in `packages/storyboard/src/core/artifact/schemas/`. The schema drives validation, form rendering, and CLI help text.

```json
// schemas/prototype.schema.json
{
  "$id": "artifact:prototype",
  "type": "object",
  "required": ["name"],
  "properties": {
    "name": {
      "type": "string",
      "pattern": "^[a-z0-9]+(?:-[a-z0-9]+)*$",
      "maxLength": 64
    },
    "title": { "type": "string" },
    "description": { "type": "string" },
    "author": {
      "oneOf": [
        { "type": "string" },
        { "type": "array", "items": { "type": "string" } }
      ]
    },
    "folder": { "type": "string" },
    "icon": { "type": "string" },
    "tags": { "type": "array", "items": { "type": "string" } },
    "team": { "type": "string" },
    "url": {
      "type": "string",
      "format": "uri",
      "description": "External URL — when present, prototype is external (no index.jsx)"
    },
    "flow": { "type": "boolean", "default": false },
    "partial": { "type": "string" }
  }
}
```

### All Artifact Types

| Type | Required | Optional |
|------|----------|----------|
| `prototype` | name | title, description, author, folder, icon, tags, team, flow, partial, **url** (makes it external) |
| `canvas` | name | title, description, folder, grid, jsx |
| `component` | name | directory |
| `flow` | name, prototype | title, description, author, folder, globals, copy-from, starting-page |
| `object` | name | folder, body (freeform JSON) |
| `record` | name | folder, entries (array with id) |
| `page` | prototype, path | folder, template |

> **Note:** External prototypes are just prototypes with a `url` field. When `url` is present, no `index.jsx` or flow is generated — the prototype opens the URL in a new tab.

All names: `^[a-z0-9]+(?:-[a-z0-9]+)*$`, max 64 chars.

---

## 2. API Design

Endpoints at `/_storyboard/artifact/`:

| Method | Path | Purpose |
|--------|------|--------|
| POST | `/` | Create artifact |
| PATCH | `/` | Edit metadata |
| DELETE | `/` | Delete artifact |
| GET | `/list?type=X` | List artifacts |
| GET | `/schema?type=X` | Get JSON Schema |

### POST / (Create)
```json
{ "type": "prototype", "name": "my-app", "folder": "main", "flow": true }
// → 201 { success, type, name, path, files[] }

// External prototype — same type, just add url:
{ "type": "prototype", "name": "figma-proto", "url": "https://figma.com/..." }
// → 201 { success, type, name, path, files: ["...prototype.json"] }
```

### PATCH / (Edit)
```json
{ "type": "prototype", "name": "my-app", "title": "New Title" }
// → 200 { success, updated }
```

### DELETE /
```json
{ "type": "prototype", "name": "my-app", "folder": "main" }
// → 200 { success, deleted }
```

### Errors
- 400: `{ error, field }` — validation failure
- 409: `{ error }` — name conflict
- 404: `{ error }` — not found

---

## 3. CLI Design

```bash
storyboard artifact create <type> [flags]
storyboard artifact edit <type> <name> [flags]
storyboard artifact delete <type> <name> [--force]
storyboard artifact list [type] [--folder X]
storyboard artifact schema <type>
```

Examples:
```bash
storyboard artifact create prototype --name my-app --folder main --flow
storyboard artifact create prototype --name figma-proto --url https://figma.com/...
storyboard artifact create canvas --name design-system
storyboard artifact create flow --name settings --prototype my-app
storyboard artifact create object --name nav --body '{"items":[]}'
storyboard artifact create component --name LoginForm
storyboard artifact create page --prototype my-app --path settings/general
```

Flags map 1:1 to schema fields. `--json` for structured output.

---

## 4. Validation Rules

1. **Parse** — coerce types (string→array for author)
2. **Schema validate** — JSON Schema (required, patterns, types)
3. **Semantic validate** — uniqueness, references exist, reserved names
4. Returns `{ valid: true, normalized }` or `{ valid: false, errors[] }`

| Rule | Scope |
|------|-------|
| Kebab-case, max 64 | all names |
| Unique within scope | all |
| Reserved: index, app, _app | prototype, page |
| Valid URL (when provided) | prototype with url |
| Prototype must exist | flow, page |
| No duplicate flow names | flow |
| url + flow are mutually exclusive | prototype |

---

## 5. Disk Operations

**prototype (standard):** `src/prototypes/{folder.folder?/}{name}/` → `.prototype.json` + `index.jsx` + optional `.flow.json`

**prototype (external, url provided):** same dir → `.prototype.json` with `url` field only. No index.jsx, no flow.

**canvas:** `src/canvas/{folder?/}{name}.canvas.jsonl` + optional `.canvas.jsx`

**component:** `src/components/{dir?/}{PascalName}/` → `.jsx` + `.module.css` + `.story.jsx`

**flow:** inside prototype dir → `{name}.flow.json`

**object:** `src/data/{name}.object.json` (global) or inside prototype (scoped)

**record:** `src/data/{name}.record.json` (global) or inside prototype (scoped)

**page:** inside prototype → `pages/{path}.jsx`

---

## 6. File Structure

```
packages/storyboard/src/core/artifact/
├── schemas/*.schema.json
├── validate.js
├── operations.js
├── routes.js
└── index.js
```

Integration: `routeHandlers.set('artifact', ...)` in server-plugin.js. Existing workshop routes become aliases during migration.

# ArtifactForm — UI Layer

Renders forms from `ARTIFACT_SCHEMAS` at `src/components/ArtifactForm/artifactSchemas.js`.

## How the UI Consumes the Schema

```jsx
<ArtifactForm type="prototype" onSubmit={fn} />
// or with type picker:
<ArtifactForm onSubmit={fn} />
```

### Schema → Field Rendering

Each schema entry drives the form automatically:

| Schema field type | Renders as |
|---|---|
| `text` | `<TextInput>` with pattern hint caption |
| `url` | `<TextInput type="url">` with URL validation |
| `textarea` | `<Textarea rows={3}>` |
| `code` | `<Textarea rows={8}>` monospace + JSON validation |
| `select` | `<select>` — static options or `dynamic: "prototypes"` |
| `checkbox` | `<input type="checkbox">` inline with label |

### Schema → Validation

`validateArtifact(type, values)` runs client-side before submit:

1. **Required** — checks `field.required`
2. **Pattern** — regex from `field.pattern` (kebab-case, PascalCase, path)
3. **Max length** — `field.maxLength` (64 chars for names)
4. **URL format** — `new URL()` parse for `type: "url"` fields
5. **JSON parse** — `JSON.parse()` for `type: "code"` fields
6. **Mutual exclusivity** — `schema.mutuallyExclusive` groups (e.g. url+flow on prototype)

### Schema → Type Picker

The `TypeSelector` component reads all keys from `ARTIFACT_SCHEMAS` and renders a Primer `ActionMenu` dropdown with:
- `schema.icon` as leading visual
- `schema.label` as item text
- `schema.description` as block description

Switching types resets form values to that schema field defaults.

### Compact Mode

`<ArtifactForm compact>` filters `visibleFields` to only `field.required === true`, showing the minimal creation form.

### Schema → Submit Payload

On valid submit, calls `onSubmit({ type, operation, values })` where `values` maps field names to their input values. The consumer (command palette, canvas menu, CLI) translates this to the API call:

```js
// values from form:
{ name: "my-app", title: "My App", folder: "main", flow: true }
// → POST /_storyboard/artifact/
// body: { type: "prototype", name: "my-app", title: "My App", folder: "main", flow: true }
```

- **Canvas Add Menu** — renders `ArtifactForm` in a popover
- **Workspace Button** — renders `ArtifactForm` in a dialog
- **CLI** — `storyboard artifact create <type>` reads same schemas for flag generation

├── ArtifactForm.jsx      ← Main component (TypeSelector, FieldRenderer)

# Artifact Schema & API Specification

## 1. Schema Format

Each artifact type is defined by a JSON Schema document stored in `packages/storyboard/src/core/artifact/schemas/`. The schema drives validation, form rendering, and CLI help text.

```json
// schemas/prototype.schema.json
{
  "$id": "artifact:prototype",
  "type": "object",
  "required": ["name"],
  "properties": {
    "name": {
      "type": "string",
      "pattern": "^[a-z0-9]+(?:-[a-z0-9]+)*$",
      "maxLength": 64
    },
    "title": { "type": "string" },
    "description": { "type": "string" },
    "author": {
      "oneOf": [
        { "type": "string" },
        { "type": "array", "items": { "type": "string" } }
      ]
    },
    "folder": { "type": "string" },
    "icon": { "type": "string" },
    "tags": { "type": "array", "items": { "type": "string" } },
    "team": { "type": "string" },
    "url": {
      "type": "string",
      "format": "uri",
      "description": "External URL — when present, prototype is external (no index.jsx)"
    },
    "flow": { "type": "boolean", "default": false },
    "partial": { "type": "string" }
  }
}
```

### All Artifact Types

| Type | Required | Optional |
|------|----------|----------|
| `prototype` | name | title, description, author, folder, icon, tags, team, flow, partial, **url** (makes it external) |
| `canvas` | name | title, description, folder, grid, jsx |
| `component` | name | directory |
| `flow` | name, prototype | title, description, author, folder, globals, copy-from, starting-page |
| `object` | name | folder, body (freeform JSON) |
| `record` | name | folder, entries (array with id) |
| `page` | prototype, path | folder, template |

> **Note:** External prototypes are just prototypes with a `url` field. When `url` is present, no `index.jsx` or flow is generated — the prototype opens the URL in a new tab.

All names: `^[a-z0-9]+(?:-[a-z0-9]+)*$`, max 64 chars.

---

## 2. API Design

Endpoints at `/_storyboard/artifact/`:

| Method | Path | Purpose |
|--------|------|--------|
| POST | `/` | Create artifact |
| PATCH | `/` | Edit metadata |
| DELETE | `/` | Delete artifact |
| GET | `/list?type=X` | List artifacts |
| GET | `/schema?type=X` | Get JSON Schema |

### POST / (Create)
```json
{ "type": "prototype", "name": "my-app", "folder": "main", "flow": true }
// → 201 { success, type, name, path, files[] }

// External prototype — same type, just add url:
{ "type": "prototype", "name": "figma-proto", "url": "https://figma.com/..." }
// → 201 { success, type, name, path, files: ["...prototype.json"] }
```

### PATCH / (Edit)
```json
{ "type": "prototype", "name": "my-app", "title": "New Title" }
// → 200 { success, updated }
```

### DELETE /
```json
{ "type": "prototype", "name": "my-app", "folder": "main" }
// → 200 { success, deleted }
```

### Errors
- 400: `{ error, field }` — validation failure
- 409: `{ error }` — name conflict
- 404: `{ error }` — not found

---

## 3. CLI Design

```bash
storyboard artifact create <type> [flags]
storyboard artifact edit <type> <name> [flags]
storyboard artifact delete <type> <name> [--force]
storyboard artifact list [type] [--folder X]
storyboard artifact schema <type>
```

Examples:
```bash
storyboard artifact create prototype --name my-app --folder main --flow
storyboard artifact create prototype --name figma-proto --url https://figma.com/...
storyboard artifact create canvas --name design-system
storyboard artifact create flow --name settings --prototype my-app
storyboard artifact create object --name nav --body '{"items":[]}'
storyboard artifact create component --name LoginForm
storyboard artifact create page --prototype my-app --path settings/general
```

Flags map 1:1 to schema fields. `--json` for structured output.

---

## 4. Validation Rules

1. **Parse** — coerce types (string→array for author)
2. **Schema validate** — JSON Schema (required, patterns, types)
3. **Semantic validate** — uniqueness, references exist, reserved names
4. Returns `{ valid: true, normalized }` or `{ valid: false, errors[] }`

| Rule | Scope |
|------|-------|
| Kebab-case, max 64 | all names |
| Unique within scope | all |
| Reserved: index, app, _app | prototype, page |
| Valid URL (when provided) | prototype with url |
| Prototype must exist | flow, page |
| No duplicate flow names | flow |
| url + flow are mutually exclusive | prototype |

---

## 5. Disk Operations

**prototype (standard):** `src/prototypes/{folder.folder?/}{name}/` → `.prototype.json` + `index.jsx` + optional `.flow.json`

**prototype (external, url provided):** same dir → `.prototype.json` with `url` field only. No index.jsx, no flow.

**canvas:** `src/canvas/{folder?/}{name}.canvas.jsonl` + optional `.canvas.jsx`

**component:** `src/components/{dir?/}{PascalName}/` → `.jsx` + `.module.css` + `.story.jsx`

**flow:** inside prototype dir → `{name}.flow.json`

**object:** `src/data/{name}.object.json` (global) or inside prototype (scoped)

**record:** `src/data/{name}.record.json` (global) or inside prototype (scoped)

**page:** inside prototype → `pages/{path}.jsx`

---

## 6. File Structure

```
packages/storyboard/src/core/artifact/
├── schemas/*.schema.json
├── validate.js
├── operations.js
├── routes.js
└── index.js
```

Integration: `routeHandlers.set('artifact', ...)` in server-plugin.js. Existing workshop routes become aliases during migration.

# Artifact Schema & API Specification

## 1. Schema Format

Each artifact type is defined by a JSON Schema document stored in `packages/storyboard/src/core/artifact/schemas/`. The schema drives validation, form rendering, and CLI help text.

```json
// schemas/prototype.schema.json
{
  "$id": "artifact:prototype",
  "type": "object",
  "required": ["name"],
  "properties": {
    "name": {
      "type": "string",
      "pattern": "^[a-z0-9]+(?:-[a-z0-9]+)*$",
      "maxLength": 64
    },
    "title": { "type": "string" },
    "description": { "type": "string" },
    "author": {
      "oneOf": [
        { "type": "string" },
        { "type": "array", "items": { "type": "string" } }
      ]
    },
    "folder": { "type": "string" },
    "icon": { "type": "string" },
    "tags": { "type": "array", "items": { "type": "string" } },
    "team": { "type": "string" },
    "url": {
      "type": "string",
      "format": "uri",
      "description": "External URL — when present, prototype is external (no index.jsx)"
    },
    "flow": { "type": "boolean", "default": false },
    "partial": { "type": "string" }
  }
}
```

### All Artifact Types

| Type | Required | Optional |
|------|----------|----------|
| `prototype` | name | title, description, author, folder, icon, tags, team, flow, partial, **url** (makes it external) |
| `canvas` | name | title, description, folder, grid, jsx |
| `component` | name | directory |
| `flow` | name, prototype | title, description, author, folder, globals, copy-from, starting-page |
| `object` | name | folder, body (freeform JSON) |
| `record` | name | folder, entries (array with id) |
| `page` | prototype, path | folder, template |

> **Note:** External prototypes are just prototypes with a `url` field. When `url` is present, no `index.jsx` or flow is generated — the prototype opens the URL in a new tab.

All names: `^[a-z0-9]+(?:-[a-z0-9]+)*$`, max 64 chars.

---

## 2. API Design

Endpoints at `/_storyboard/artifact/`:

| Method | Path | Purpose |
|--------|------|--------|
| POST | `/` | Create artifact |
| PATCH | `/` | Edit metadata |
| DELETE | `/` | Delete artifact |
| GET | `/list?type=X` | List artifacts |
| GET | `/schema?type=X` | Get JSON Schema |

### POST / (Create)
```json
{ "type": "prototype", "name": "my-app", "folder": "main", "flow": true }
// → 201 { success, type, name, path, files[] }

// External prototype — same type, just add url:
{ "type": "prototype", "name": "figma-proto", "url": "https://figma.com/..." }
// → 201 { success, type, name, path, files: ["...prototype.json"] }
```

### PATCH / (Edit)
```json
{ "type": "prototype", "name": "my-app", "title": "New Title" }
// → 200 { success, updated }
```

### DELETE /
```json
{ "type": "prototype", "name": "my-app", "folder": "main" }
// → 200 { success, deleted }
```

### Errors
- 400: `{ error, field }` — validation failure
- 409: `{ error }` — name conflict
- 404: `{ error }` — not found

---

## 3. CLI Design

```bash
storyboard artifact create <type> [flags]
storyboard artifact edit <type> <name> [flags]
storyboard artifact delete <type> <name> [--force]
storyboard artifact list [type] [--folder X]
storyboard artifact schema <type>
```

Examples:
```bash
storyboard artifact create prototype --name my-app --folder main --flow
storyboard artifact create prototype --name figma-proto --url https://figma.com/...
storyboard artifact create canvas --name design-system
storyboard artifact create flow --name settings --prototype my-app
storyboard artifact create object --name nav --body '{"items":[]}'
storyboard artifact create component --name LoginForm
storyboard artifact create page --prototype my-app --path settings/general
```

Flags map 1:1 to schema fields. `--json` for structured output.

---

## 4. Validation Rules

1. **Parse** — coerce types (string→array for author)
2. **Schema validate** — JSON Schema (required, patterns, types)
3. **Semantic validate** — uniqueness, references exist, reserved names
4. Returns `{ valid: true, normalized }` or `{ valid: false, errors[] }`

| Rule | Scope |
|------|-------|
| Kebab-case, max 64 | all names |
| Unique within scope | all |
| Reserved: index, app, _app | prototype, page |
| Valid URL (when provided) | prototype with url |
| Prototype must exist | flow, page |
| No duplicate flow names | flow |
| url + flow are mutually exclusive | prototype |

---

## 5. Disk Operations

**prototype (standard):** `src/prototypes/{folder.folder?/}{name}/` → `.prototype.json` + `index.jsx` + optional `.flow.json`

**prototype (external, url provided):** same dir → `.prototype.json` with `url` field only. No index.jsx, no flow.

**canvas:** `src/canvas/{folder?/}{name}.canvas.jsonl` + optional `.canvas.jsx`

**component:** `src/components/{dir?/}{PascalName}/` → `.jsx` + `.module.css` + `.story.jsx`

**flow:** inside prototype dir → `{name}.flow.json`

**object:** `src/data/{name}.object.json` (global) or inside prototype (scoped)

**record:** `src/data/{name}.record.json` (global) or inside prototype (scoped)

**page:** inside prototype → `pages/{path}.jsx`

---

## 6. File Structure

```
packages/storyboard/src/core/artifact/
├── schemas/*.schema.json
├── validate.js
├── operations.js
├── routes.js
└── index.js
```

Integration: `routeHandlers.set('artifact', ...)` in server-plugin.js. Existing workshop routes become aliases during migration.

prototype, canvas, component, flow, object, record, page — all supported in Command Palette, Viewfinder, and CLI.

## Key Decisions

1. Canvas story creation stays on /create-story (lightweight inline op)
2. Component names accept PascalCase or kebab-case

# ArtifactForm — UI Layer

Renders forms from `ARTIFACT_SCHEMAS` at `src/components/ArtifactForm/artifactSchemas.js`.

## How the UI Consumes the Schema

```jsx
<ArtifactForm type="prototype" onSubmit={fn} />
// or with type picker:
<ArtifactForm onSubmit={fn} />
```

### Schema → Field Rendering

Each schema entry drives the form automatically:

| Schema field type | Renders as |
|---|---|
| `text` | `<TextInput>` with pattern hint caption |
| `url` | `<TextInput type="url">` with URL validation |
| `textarea` | `<Textarea rows={3}>` |
| `code` | `<Textarea rows={8}>` monospace + JSON validation |
| `select` | `<select>` — static options or `dynamic: "prototypes"` |
| `checkbox` | `<input type="checkbox">` inline with label |

### Schema → Validation

`validateArtifact(type, values)` runs client-side before submit:

1. **Required** — checks `field.required`
2. **Pattern** — regex from `field.pattern` (kebab-case, PascalCase, path)
3. **Max length** — `field.maxLength` (64 chars for names)
4. **URL format** — `new URL()` parse for `type: "url"` fields
5. **JSON parse** — `JSON.parse()` for `type: "code"` fields
6. **Mutual exclusivity** — `schema.mutuallyExclusive` groups (e.g. url+flow on prototype)

### Schema → Type Picker

The `TypeSelector` component reads all keys from `ARTIFACT_SCHEMAS` and renders a Primer `ActionMenu` dropdown with:
- `schema.icon` as leading visual
- `schema.label` as item text
- `schema.description` as block description

Switching types resets form values to that schema field defaults.

### Compact Mode

`<ArtifactForm compact>` filters `visibleFields` to only `field.required === true`, showing the minimal creation form.

### Schema → Submit Payload

On valid submit, calls `onSubmit({ type, operation, values })` where `values` maps field names to their input values. The consumer (command palette, canvas menu, CLI) translates this to the API call:

```js
// values from form:
{ name: "my-app", title: "My App", folder: "main", flow: true }
// → POST /_storyboard/artifact/
// body: { type: "prototype", name: "my-app", title: "My App", folder: "main", flow: true }
```

## Integration Points

- **Command Palette** — `CreateDialog.jsx` will import `ArtifactForm` + `ARTIFACT_SCHEMAS`
- **Canvas Add Menu** — renders `ArtifactForm` in a popover
- **Workspace Button** — renders `ArtifactForm` in a dialog
- **CLI** — `storyboard artifact create <type>` reads same schemas for flag generation

## File Structure

```
src/components/ArtifactForm/
├── artifactSchemas.js    ← Schema definitions + validateArtifact()
├── ArtifactForm.jsx      ← Main component (TypeSelector, FieldRenderer)
├── ArtifactForm.module.css
└── artifact-form.story.jsx  ← 11 stories
```

# Artifact Schema — Unified Creation System

## Status: ✅ IMPLEMENTED & WIRED

All creation surfaces now use a single /_storyboard/artifact/ API.

## 7 Artifact Types

prototype, canvas, component, flow, object, record, page — all supported in Command Palette, Viewfinder, and CLI.

## Key Decisions

1. Canvas story creation stays on /create-story (lightweight inline op)
2. Component names accept PascalCase or kebab-case
3. Objects/records support prototype scoping
4. Old workshop endpoints preserved for backward compat
5. Content field auto-mapped (UI sends string JSON, API normalizes)

# ArtifactForm — UI Layer

Renders forms from `ARTIFACT_SCHEMAS` at `src/components/ArtifactForm/artifactSchemas.js`.

## How the UI Consumes the Schema

```jsx
<ArtifactForm type="prototype" onSubmit={fn} />
// or with type picker:
<ArtifactForm onSubmit={fn} />
```

### Schema → Field Rendering

Each schema entry drives the form automatically:

| Schema field type | Renders as |
|---|---|
| `text` | `<TextInput>` with pattern hint caption |
| `url` | `<TextInput type="url">` with URL validation |
| `textarea` | `<Textarea rows={3}>` |
| `code` | `<Textarea rows={8}>` monospace + JSON validation |
| `select` | `<select>` — static options or `dynamic: "prototypes"` |
| `checkbox` | `<input type="checkbox">` inline with label |

### Schema → Validation

`validateArtifact(type, values)` runs client-side before submit:

1. **Required** — checks `field.required`
2. **Pattern** — regex from `field.pattern` (kebab-case, PascalCase, path)
3. **Max length** — `field.maxLength` (64 chars for names)
4. **URL format** — `new URL()` parse for `type: "url"` fields
5. **JSON parse** — `JSON.parse()` for `type: "code"` fields
6. **Mutual exclusivity** — `schema.mutuallyExclusive` groups (e.g. url+flow on prototype)

### Schema → Type Picker

The `TypeSelector` component reads all keys from `ARTIFACT_SCHEMAS` and renders a Primer `ActionMenu` dropdown with:
- `schema.icon` as leading visual
- `schema.label` as item text
- `schema.description` as block description

Switching types resets form values to that schema field defaults.

### Compact Mode

`<ArtifactForm compact>` filters `visibleFields` to only `field.required === true`, showing the minimal creation form.

### Schema → Submit Payload

On valid submit, calls `onSubmit({ type, operation, values })` where `values` maps field names to their input values. The consumer (command palette, canvas menu, CLI) translates this to the API call:

```js
// values from form:
{ name: "my-app", title: "My App", folder: "main", flow: true }
// → POST /_storyboard/artifact/
// body: { type: "prototype", name: "my-app", title: "My App", folder: "main", flow: true }
```

- **Command Palette** — `CreateDialog.jsx` will import `ArtifactForm` + `ARTIFACT_SCHEMAS`
- **Canvas Add Menu** — renders `ArtifactForm` in a popover
- **Workspace Button** — renders `ArtifactForm` in a dialog
- **CLI** — `storyboard artifact create <type>` reads same schemas for flag generation

src/components/ArtifactForm/
├── artifactSchemas.js    ← Schema definitions + validateArtifact()
├── ArtifactForm.jsx      ← Main component (TypeSelector, FieldRenderer)
├── ArtifactForm.module.css
└── artifact-form.story.jsx  ← 11 stories
```

# Artifact Schema & API Specification

## 1. Schema Format

Each artifact type is defined by a JSON Schema document stored in `packages/storyboard/src/core/artifact/schemas/`. The schema drives validation, form rendering, and CLI help text.

```json
// schemas/prototype.schema.json
{
  "$id": "artifact:prototype",
  "type": "object",
  "required": ["name"],
  "properties": {
    "name": {
      "type": "string",
      "pattern": "^[a-z0-9]+(?:-[a-z0-9]+)*$",
      "maxLength": 64
    },
    "title": { "type": "string" },
    "description": { "type": "string" },
    "author": {
      "oneOf": [
        { "type": "string" },
        { "type": "array", "items": { "type": "string" } }
      ]
    },
    "folder": { "type": "string" },
    "icon": { "type": "string" },
    "tags": { "type": "array", "items": { "type": "string" } },
    "team": { "type": "string" },
    "url": {
      "type": "string",
      "format": "uri",
      "description": "External URL — when present, prototype is external (no index.jsx)"
    },
    "flow": { "type": "boolean", "default": false },
    "partial": { "type": "string" }
  }
}
```

### All Artifact Types

| Type | Required | Optional |
|------|----------|----------|
| `prototype` | name | title, description, author, folder, icon, tags, team, flow, partial, **url** (makes it external) |
| `canvas` | name | title, description, folder, grid, jsx |
| `component` | name | directory |
| `flow` | name, prototype | title, description, author, folder, globals, copy-from, starting-page |
| `object` | name | folder, body (freeform JSON) |
| `record` | name | folder, entries (array with id) |
| `page` | prototype, path | folder, template |

> **Note:** External prototypes are just prototypes with a `url` field. When `url` is present, no `index.jsx` or flow is generated — the prototype opens the URL in a new tab.

All names: `^[a-z0-9]+(?:-[a-z0-9]+)*$`, max 64 chars.

---

## 2. API Design

Endpoints at `/_storyboard/artifact/`:

| Method | Path | Purpose |
|--------|------|--------|
| POST | `/` | Create artifact |
| PATCH | `/` | Edit metadata |
| DELETE | `/` | Delete artifact |
| GET | `/list?type=X` | List artifacts |
| GET | `/schema?type=X` | Get JSON Schema |

### POST / (Create)
```json
{ "type": "prototype", "name": "my-app", "folder": "main", "flow": true }
// → 201 { success, type, name, path, files[] }

// External prototype — same type, just add url:
{ "type": "prototype", "name": "figma-proto", "url": "https://figma.com/..." }
// → 201 { success, type, name, path, files: ["...prototype.json"] }
```

### PATCH / (Edit)
```json
{ "type": "prototype", "name": "my-app", "title": "New Title" }
// → 200 { success, updated }
```

### DELETE /
```json
{ "type": "prototype", "name": "my-app", "folder": "main" }
// → 200 { success, deleted }
```

### Errors
- 400: `{ error, field }` — validation failure
- 409: `{ error }` — name conflict
- 404: `{ error }` — not found

---

## 3. CLI Design

```bash
storyboard artifact create <type> [flags]
storyboard artifact edit <type> <name> [flags]
storyboard artifact delete <type> <name> [--force]
storyboard artifact list [type] [--folder X]
storyboard artifact schema <type>
```

Examples:
```bash
storyboard artifact create prototype --name my-app --folder main --flow
storyboard artifact create prototype --name figma-proto --url https://figma.com/...
storyboard artifact create canvas --name design-system
storyboard artifact create flow --name settings --prototype my-app
storyboard artifact create object --name nav --body '{"items":[]}'
storyboard artifact create component --name LoginForm
storyboard artifact create page --prototype my-app --path settings/general
```

Flags map 1:1 to schema fields. `--json` for structured output.

---

## 4. Validation Rules

1. **Parse** — coerce types (string→array for author)
2. **Schema validate** — JSON Schema (required, patterns, types)
3. **Semantic validate** — uniqueness, references exist, reserved names
4. Returns `{ valid: true, normalized }` or `{ valid: false, errors[] }`

| Rule | Scope |
|------|-------|
| Kebab-case, max 64 | all names |
| Unique within scope | all |
| Reserved: index, app, _app | prototype, page |
| Valid URL (when provided) | prototype with url |
| Prototype must exist | flow, page |
| No duplicate flow names | flow |
| url + flow are mutually exclusive | prototype |

---

## 5. Disk Operations

**prototype (standard):** `src/prototypes/{folder.folder?/}{name}/` → `.prototype.json` + `index.jsx` + optional `.flow.json`

**prototype (external, url provided):** same dir → `.prototype.json` with `url` field only. No index.jsx, no flow.

**canvas:** `src/canvas/{folder?/}{name}.canvas.jsonl` + optional `.canvas.jsx`

**component:** `src/components/{dir?/}{PascalName}/` → `.jsx` + `.module.css` + `.story.jsx`

**flow:** inside prototype dir → `{name}.flow.json`

**object:** `src/data/{name}.object.json` (global) or inside prototype (scoped)

**record:** `src/data/{name}.record.json` (global) or inside prototype (scoped)

**page:** inside prototype → `pages/{path}.jsx`

---

## 6. File Structure

```
packages/storyboard/src/core/artifact/
├── schemas/*.schema.json
├── validate.js
├── operations.js
├── routes.js
└── index.js
```

Integration: `routeHandlers.set('artifact', ...)` in server-plugin.js. Existing workshop routes become aliases during migration.

## Status: ✅ IMPLEMENTED & WIRED

## 7 Artifact Types

prototype, canvas, component, flow, object, record, page — all supported in Command Palette, Viewfinder, and CLI.

## Key Decisions

1. Canvas story creation stays on /create-story (lightweight inline op)
2. Component names accept PascalCase or kebab-case
3. Objects/records support prototype scoping
4. Old workshop endpoints preserved for backward compat

# ArtifactForm — UI Layer

Renders forms from `ARTIFACT_SCHEMAS` at `src/components/ArtifactForm/artifactSchemas.js`.

## How the UI Consumes the Schema

```jsx
<ArtifactForm type="prototype" onSubmit={fn} />
// or with type picker:
<ArtifactForm onSubmit={fn} />
```

### Schema → Field Rendering

Each schema entry drives the form automatically:

| Schema field type | Renders as |
|---|---|
| `text` | `<TextInput>` with pattern hint caption |
| `url` | `<TextInput type="url">` with URL validation |
| `textarea` | `<Textarea rows={3}>` |
| `code` | `<Textarea rows={8}>` monospace + JSON validation |
| `select` | `<select>` — static options or `dynamic: "prototypes"` |
| `checkbox` | `<input type="checkbox">` inline with label |

### Schema → Validation

`validateArtifact(type, values)` runs client-side before submit:

1. **Required** — checks `field.required`
2. **Pattern** — regex from `field.pattern` (kebab-case, PascalCase, path)
3. **Max length** — `field.maxLength` (64 chars for names)
4. **URL format** — `new URL()` parse for `type: "url"` fields
5. **JSON parse** — `JSON.parse()` for `type: "code"` fields
6. **Mutual exclusivity** — `schema.mutuallyExclusive` groups (e.g. url+flow on prototype)

### Schema → Type Picker

The `TypeSelector` component reads all keys from `ARTIFACT_SCHEMAS` and renders a Primer `ActionMenu` dropdown with:
- `schema.icon` as leading visual
- `schema.label` as item text
- `schema.description` as block description

Switching types resets form values to that schema field defaults.

### Compact Mode

`<ArtifactForm compact>` filters `visibleFields` to only `field.required === true`, showing the minimal creation form.

### Schema → Submit Payload

On valid submit, calls `onSubmit({ type, operation, values })` where `values` maps field names to their input values. The consumer (command palette, canvas menu, CLI) translates this to the API call:

```js
// values from form:
{ name: "my-app", title: "My App", folder: "main", flow: true }
// → POST /_storyboard/artifact/
// body: { type: "prototype", name: "my-app", title: "My App", folder: "main", flow: true }
```

## Integration Points

- **Command Palette** — `CreateDialog.jsx` will import `ArtifactForm` + `ARTIFACT_SCHEMAS`
- **Canvas Add Menu** — renders `ArtifactForm` in a popover
- **Workspace Button** — renders `ArtifactForm` in a dialog
- **CLI** — `storyboard artifact create <type>` reads same schemas for flag generation

## File Structure

```
src/components/ArtifactForm/
├── artifactSchemas.js    ← Schema definitions + validateArtifact()
├── ArtifactForm.jsx      ← Main component (TypeSelector, FieldRenderer)
├── ArtifactForm.module.css
└── artifact-form.story.jsx  ← 11 stories
```

// schemas/prototype.schema.json

    "url": {
      "type": "string",
      "format": "uri",
      "description": "External URL — when present, prototype is external (no index.jsx)"

    "flow": { "type": "boolean", "default": false },
    "partial": { "type": "string" }
  }
}
